inputs.label: Divisor
inputs.businessContext: The number to divide by (must be non-zero)

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the result

formulas.primaryResult: divisor === 0 ? 0 : (roundingMode === 0 ? Math.floor((dividend / divisor) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : roundingMode === 2 ? Math.ceil((dividend / divisor) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : Math.round((dividend / divisor) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces))
